name: Josh Hawley
subject: Jeff Bezos Crony Capitalism On Full Display
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
This week, we saw Jeff Bezos embody all that is wrong with big tech AND crony capitalism. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=26a1b8d293454b7688e4796a28eaca70&_e=nECjwywzjceu9JUpWLdLEqjrVLEGB34r8UlnAd64xpk-g5fXVCS9X87FPPsZoeLYB0KJHgw8YQaHk7QkWc3Ppi2niEP1yin5j922xWK3KPQmChkbTmuOYHnzw2KLmatFrp5AQLFi8IBurUtNqSiBOgLsmey_CgAEeyTs0MDROsilaYSf_dfl-n-CX5wvYQRsjvzeGwTrX78NCNlTe6lpme9O2egaJoqA1eXPaaQFBh4LP5gS-w4Wc1oftyUiJ6ntTjI6NACWWfRepVrNk0bHdhU7K8Vhm5W2w8nJKWGE-m5QcWmMPufElae5kTuqD1bEsDtSrx_vyFSDaClXLpsSu9nRmg9GxUse6huL9w1DYt0vc0iJq1r_c2QauXJBlUoI1uOx1CxjKiBzTqQT-_zewy_iHXnlIogEoAZ-WjgtyvM%3D) | |

Peter,
It is clear that Amazon is no longer simply the bookstore it was founded as, and the tentacles of Jeff Bezos have stretched beyond reason.

This week, we saw Bezos embody all that is wrong with big tech AND crony capitalism.

[**I’m not scared of calling out digital oligarchs and crony capitalists—Will you join my fight?**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=26a1b8d293454b7688e4796a28eaca70&_e=nECjwywzjceu9JUpWLdLEqjrVLEGB34r8UlnAd64xpk-g5fXVCS9X87FPPsZoeLYB0KJHgw8YQaHk7QkWc3Ppi2niEP1yin5j922xWK3KPQmChkbTmuOYHnzw2KLmatFrp5AQLFi8IBurUtNqSiBOgLsmey_CgAEeyTs0MDROsilaYSf_dfl-n-CX5wvYQRsotjnku2NGKZT93fjK0v682hDsIC2gITsyDCEYYqVo-GPEWtkUj4lySuSa4-rKH-61-vTGtmE0syELpIgthrq_fFXuBOE9RTdXEZrFs8sf0pxC6EaQAzHgIrarHDprLCCgSsW1vWaWP77FxS-Pm8S9fDEYVND9MWPYgVw2g3qG3Y0p8faQ_GSWaMdHWlB9uzTqzPxYK-Wig9dZ74-Zt_YzNoWVc2HPkHUkhJ6VKLzpP0%3D)

These two headlines, written one day apart, say it all.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=26a1b8d293454b7688e4796a28eaca70&_e=nECjwywzjceu9JUpWLdLEqjrVLEGB34r8UlnAd64xpk-g5fXVCS9X87FPPsZoeLYB0KJHgw8YQaHk7QkWc3Ppi2niEP1yin5j922xWK3KPQmChkbTmuOYHnzw2KLmatFrp5AQLFi8IBurUtNqSiBOgLsmey_CgAEeyTs0MDROsilaYSf_dfl-n-CX5wvYQRs0d-hexrGK0T_Gto8FCpDHKQrpGa0jppBWY3HRmxh5wDaW3Hwd4oaBgUtjAO8KsUQlXyGF3L5u4iV75m7WQK3zyeBakWPah6Bor2Qez_AwczkIbATk5b1_I1oe3eEW8iqia5F6zRasvaoPe5BknWc47Cc7h95FGaZJfavAmADIr-unWCxhJbS9Z_eiePYJizlen_bHGcJua0pSANXB2ZSt-6IWSH78Sui-jNCoxXK15M%3D)
One day, a Jeff Bezos corporation was gifted a $10 billion bailout, through amendment snuck onto a bill aimed at increasing competitiveness with China.

The next day, a different Jeff Bezos company purchases a movie studio and movie franchise for $8.5 billion.

That doesn’t add up to me.

name: Andy Biggs
subject: Blame Trump for EVERYTHING
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57544256:6qfdzYl8N:m:1:3103520637:7C609B8315FD49674BAF0C119424687E:r "Nancy Pelosi") Peter, Nancy Pelosi is obsessed with personally destroying Donald Trump and attacking his supporters. She is still using every tool at her disposal to go after him. It doesn't matter that he is out of office. It doesn't matter that she concocted two sham impeachment trials against him. She and her socialist friends can't let him go. **President Trump stood up for us, and Nancy Pelosi can 't STAND that.** Now, Nancy Pelosi wants to create a "commission" to study the January 6th events at the U.S. Capitol so she can blame that on President Trump too. **This is ridiculous.[I need your help to keep calling out Nancy when she panders to the Left and wastes millions of taxpayer dollars on her latest witch hunt.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57544256:6qfdzYl8N:m:1:3103520637:7C609B8315FD49674BAF0C119424687E:r "I need your help to keep calling out Nancy when she panders to
the Left and wastes millions of taxpayer dollars on her latest witch hunt.")** That's all this is--pandering. Just another hoax! **Nancy Pelosi thrives on power and doesn 't want to give up control.** She wants to decide when and where you have to wear a mask, whether you can leave your house or go to work, and whether Republicans should still support Donald Trump. **I 'M SICK OF IT** and I refuse to be quiet. **[Will you stand with me as I fight back?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57544256:6qfdzYl8N:m:1:3103520637:7C609B8315FD49674BAF0C119424687E:r "Will you stand with me as I fight back?")** **I 'm Congressman Andy Biggs, Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus, and a principled conservative [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57544256:6qfdzYl8N:m:1:3103520637:7C609B8315FD49674BAF0C119424687E:r "Nancy Pelosi")from Arizona. And I need your help.** Nancy doesn't care about what really happened on January 6th. If she did, she would have condemned the BLM riots that burned American cities last year. She only cares now because she can blame Donald Trump. **We can 't let Nancy keep targeting Republicans. We can't let her keep her firm grip on power.** Someone needs to stand up. If not us, who? If not now, when? **[Please do all you can to help me keep fighting in Congress against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57544256:6qfdzYl8N:m:1:3103520637:7C609B8315FD49674BAF0C119424687E:r "Please do all you can to help me keep fighting in Congress
against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left.")** God bless you and God bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57544256:6qfdzYl8N:m:1:3103520637:7C609B8315FD49674BAF0C119424687E:r "Andy Biggs") Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)

body:
I am concerned.
|
---
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jm3i3hdlqUlGFDJByut21JnCnAtL7I8DA-oY7gsYsop692J9cld0xZz00DO4ywoZkEJYnahLsZoSQJDq10WwOVC_0rrZ9ur7BpguwjxXPYvFFJHt2wBE0jMWq3t8mDOrR3QOk3-mVkb9AeloDe0ryaRQ5sWlSWbQfmUrI0eCYkKWiDHCLhNugQLB3IJ8LSKiUblqNiWJ91Po9P3lphU5R0fHmSutEWYU-s9wuk1YvTuihXr98ttbXntcyNcsaJVoYzjm89mOUmRhy-qZAbrqPZXMKDq442K7Hp4qRgBzFmVBoXUiAb4utKUeUBurcLmVSLaf45mZFrnluSW3tPfOwmwQ1Kc700qu2LIdtkBGeZ5ZUMq-0awa-B4qQiHAyBlEKRFvrVSU7wUDAwFZb7Qi-qhjE5yvPNhGjBQUbYTxTs4CEquALc8mb78eQhqnCqPU&c=eDrEOFrQl2Sc1RYpVgseBYqwfAs21L-hZfeyGGn1G-Cu0EkVOCn1og==&ch=WPS1HMwT-51TRpx2wNw4kWE1qV-fmQ18E4OmxCDGMuQ5ecnuaWupNw== "From the Desk of Mike Pompeo")

Friend,

I am concerned.

The Democrats are abusing their power and are working to ram a wishlist of far-left wing ideas through Congress. They want HIGHER taxes. They want WEAKER borders. They want FEWER jobs.

Because of this, my ONLY goal is to make sure that the Democrats do not erase President Trump and my legacy. To do this, we must kick Chuck Schumer out of his job and take back the Senate, and we must meet our MAJOR May Deadline in **1 day**.

_**[If we fail, every accomplishment the Trump Administration achieved will be ERASED, so please donate by midnight to help us reach our goal.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jm3i3hdlqUlGFDJByut21JnCnAtL7I8DA-oY7gsYsop692J9cld0xZz00DO4ywoZkEJYnahLsZoSQJDq10WwOVC_0rrZ9ur7BpguwjxXPYvFFJHt2wBE0jMWq3t8mDOrR3QOk3-mVkb9AeloDe0ryaRQ5sWlSWbQfmUrI0eCYkKWiDHCLhNugQLB3IJ8LSKiUblqNiWJ91Po9P3lphU5R0fHmSutEWYU-s9wuk1YvTuihXr98ttbXntcyNcsaJVoYzjm89mOUmRhy-qZAbrqPZXMKDq442K7Hp4qRgBzFmVBoXUiAb4utKUeUBurcLmVSLaf45mZFrnluSW3tPfOwmwQ1Kc700qu2LIdtkBGeZ5ZUMq-0awa-B4qQiHAyBlEKRFvrVSU7wUDAwFZb7Qi-qhjE5yvPNhGjBQUbYTxTs4CEquALc8mb78eQhqnCqPU&c=eDrEOFrQl2Sc1RYpVgseBYqwfAs21L-hZfeyGGn1G-Cu0EkVOCn1og==&ch=WPS1HMwT-51TRpx2wNw4kWE1qV-fmQ18E4OmxCDGMuQ5ecnuaWupNw== "If we fail, every accomplishment the Trump Administration achieved will be ERASED, so please donate by midnight to help us reach our goal.")**_

We are only a few months into the election, but what I am seeing in President Trump's home state of Florida is beginning to worry me. **The Democrats are flooding the media markets and organizing in numbers like I 've never seen before, and this is ALL to try and defeat Senator Marco Rubio.**

---
| | [HELP MARCO PUT AMERICA FIRST](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jm3i3hdlqUlGFDJByut21JnCnAtL7I8DA-oY7gsYsop692J9cld0xZz00DO4ywoZkEJYnahLsZoSQJDq10WwOVC_0rrZ9ur7BpguwjxXPYvFFJHt2wBE0jMWq3t8mDOrR3QOk3-mVkb9AeloDe0ryaRQ5sWlSWbQfmUrI0eCYkKWiDHCLhNugQLB3IJ8LSKiUblqNiWJ91Po9P3lphU5R0fHmSutEWYU-s9wuk1YvTuihXr98ttbXntcyNcsaJVoYzjm89mOUmRhy-qZAbrqPZXMKDq442K7Hp4qRgBzFmVBoXUiAb4utKUeUBurcLmVSLaf45mZFrnluSW3tPfOwmwQ1Kc700qu2LIdtkBGeZ5ZUMq-0awa-B4qQiHAyBlEKRFvrVSU7wUDAwFZb7Qi-qhjE5yvPNhGjBQUbYTxTs4CEquALc8mb78eQhqnCqPU&c=eDrEOFrQl2Sc1RYpVgseBYqwfAs21L-hZfeyGGn1G-Cu0EkVOCn1og==&ch=WPS1HMwT-51TRpx2wNw4kWE1qV-fmQ18E4OmxCDGMuQ5ecnuaWupNw== "HELP MARCO PUT AMERICA FIRST")
---

If Marco misses this May goal, the Senate Democrats will be one step closer to eliminating the filibuster so they can further push their dangerous agenda -- an agenda whose main goal is to destroy Trump's legacy -- without any obstacles in their way. They even want to add seats to the Supreme Court just to have a liberal majority so any and all checks and balances are _**erased.**_

We can stop this, though, Friend. With your help, we can get back to the days where commonsense deals are struck, our country is respected on the international stage, and America is put FIRST.

_**[But we need Marco in the Senate to do it. Can I count on you to put America First and help Marco WIN BIG in Florida?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jm3i3hdlqUlGFDJByut21JnCnAtL7I8DA-oY7gsYsop692J9cld0xZz00DO4ywoZkEJYnahLsZoSQJDq10WwOVC_0rrZ9ur7BpguwjxXPYvFFJHt2wBE0jMWq3t8mDOrR3QOk3-mVkb9AeloDe0ryaRQ5sWlSWbQfmUrI0eCYkKWiDHCLhNugQLB3IJ8LSKiUblqNiWJ91Po9P3lphU5R0fHmSutEWYU-s9wuk1YvTuihXr98ttbXntcyNcsaJVoYzjm89mOUmRhy-qZAbrqPZXMKDq442K7Hp4qRgBzFmVBoXUiAb4utKUeUBurcLmVSLaf45mZFrnluSW3tPfOwmwQ1Kc700qu2LIdtkBGeZ5ZUMq-0awa-B4qQiHAyBlEKRFvrVSU7wUDAwFZb7Qi-qhjE5yvPNhGjBQUbYTxTs4CEquALc8mb78eQhqnCqPU&c=eDrEOFrQl2Sc1RYpVgseBYqwfAs21L-hZfeyGGn1G-Cu0EkVOCn1og==&ch=WPS1HMwT-51TRpx2wNw4kWE1qV-fmQ18E4OmxCDGMuQ5ecnuaWupNw== "But we need Marco in the Senate to do it. Can I count on you to put America First and help Marco WIN BIG in Florida?")**_

body:
Military Appreciation Month is almost over
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzD48wvQd1Qo3Yij07X6uT0OWxoO-Mi6X6L3xENxc86wwg3rv8-nqhHCOiFK5nl-g3zV9SVLQTG64H5YU9ufDTVrs4UCQjKrVdKkPPq5FaZiHifD3c4slrq1K1azF_1M7VQyPEtGrsi_6h5wPPTuyrrzrloFm4dq-jDb5R_QsFbajPYzRZNjY4pQVfHEA2qIS6GI4YkoJttVjdP2WiVGR2bEHbMx9Dyx6BXU7RoVjMpVpDEFdKZ0CCnvbhABmpDvJjLu7OB6GWwtscmgqX-4RvWJJf7hZeS2zr4Nx4-TfZRSgsNPtPQeKEqRmqjLf5KNxRytYY4vLfgGC12HFadnmHKDpoANYG22oUUtmz8A2Q-xc5Nx0NqI8y_kkbfnz3bURcqJ1iRj_hM=&c=9a8nPjhFnzH6hJ1SD0Alwq4Kd4Ye10W3NkzpgUfJJpHbJCEFasxNTg==&ch=MUJYhMhclEy1czhryOFaQalWWzNrCYrYsG9FdIqqX1rJ_jnB812aLg==)
Friend,

May is almost over, and I wanted to make sure you had the chance to give an extra thanks to the brave men and women who protect our great nation every day. [_**Add your name to say THANK YOU before the end of the month!**_](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzD48wvQd1Qo3Yij07X6uT0OWxoO-Mi6X6L3xENxc86wwg3rv8-nqhHCOiFK5nl-g3zV9SVLQTG64H5YU9ufDTVrs4UCQjKrVdKkPPq5FaZiHifD3c4slrq1K1azF_1M7VQyPEtGrsi_6h5wPPTuyrrzrloFm4dq-jDb5R_QsFbajPYzRZNjY4pQVfHEA2qIS6GI4YkoJttVjdP2WiVGR2bEHbMx9Dyx6BXU7RoVjMpVpDEFdKZ0CCnvbhABmpDvJjLu7OB6GWwtscmgqX-4RvWJJf7hZeS2zr4Nx4-TfZRSgsNPtPQeKEqRmqjLf5KNxRytYY4vLfgGC12HFadnmHKDpoANYG22oUUtmz8A2Q-xc5Nx0NqI8y_kkbfnz3bURcqJ1iRj_hM=&c=9a8nPjhFnzH6hJ1SD0Alwq4Kd4Ye10W3NkzpgUfJJpHbJCEFasxNTg==&ch=MUJYhMhclEy1czhryOFaQalWWzNrCYrYsG9FdIqqX1rJ_jnB812aLg==)
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzD48wvQd1Qo3Yij07X6uT0OWxoO-Mi6X6L3xENxc86wwg3rv8-nqhHCOiFK5nl-g3zV9SVLQTG64H5YU9ufDTVrs4UCQjKrVdKkPPq5FaZiHifD3c4slrq1K1azF_1M7VQyPEtGrsi_6h5wPPTuyrrzrloFm4dq-jDb5R_QsFbajPYzRZNjY4pQVfHEA2qIS6GI4YkoJttVjdP2WiVGR2bEHbMx9Dyx6BXU7RoVjMpVpDEFdKZ0CCnvbhABmpDvJjLu7OB6GWwtscmgqX-4RvWJJf7hZeS2zr4Nx4-TfZRSgsNPtPQeKEqRmqjLf5KNxRytYY4vLfgGC12HFadnmHKDpoANYG22oUUtmz8A2Q-xc5Nx0NqI8y_kkbfnz3bURcqJ1iRj_hM=&c=9a8nPjhFnzH6hJ1SD0Alwq4Kd4Ye10W3NkzpgUfJJpHbJCEFasxNTg==&ch=MUJYhMhclEy1czhryOFaQalWWzNrCYrYsG9FdIqqX1rJ_jnB812aLg==)

As a combat veteran myself, I know how much these men and women appreciate the extra THANK YOU this month.

**[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzD48wvQd1Qo3Yij07X6uT0OWxoO-Mi6X6L3xENxc86wwg3rv8-nqhHCOiFK5nl-g3zV9SVLQTG64H5YU9ufDTVrs4UCQjKrVdKkPPq5FaZiHifD3c4slrq1K1azF_1M7VQyPEtGrsi_6h5wPPTuyrrzrloFm4dq-jDb5R_QsFbajPYzRZNjY4pQVfHEA2qIS6GI4YkoJttVjdP2WiVGR2bEHbMx9Dyx6BXU7RoVjMpVpDEFdKZ0CCnvbhABmpDvJjLu7OB6GWwtscmgqX-4RvWJJf7hZeS2zr4Nx4-TfZRSgsNPtPQeKEqRmqjLf5KNxRytYY4vLfgGC12HFadnmHKDpoANYG22oUUtmz8A2Q-xc5Nx0NqI8y_kkbfnz3bURcqJ1iRj_hM=&c=9a8nPjhFnzH6hJ1SD0Alwq4Kd4Ye10W3NkzpgUfJJpHbJCEFasxNTg==&ch=MUJYhMhclEy1czhryOFaQalWWzNrCYrYsG9FdIqqX1rJ_jnB812aLg==)**
---

I encourage you to join me in paying an extra tribute to those who are currently serving our country and those who have previously served for their selfless sacrifice before the month is over, Friend.

Thank you,

Joni Ernst
Paid for by Joni for Iowa PO BOX 93441 Des Moines, IA 50393

body:
My heart sank when I heard the news.

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SJfJBrzbQrlGAxR5bo80OXpQMEXNLjYG4EobunjagUaniK76LLz8D-QTGD9Lmh1q002UVzo88wHHLCLdxdRKShWNLp2cA9qIG4DkrT7sp8f_SDHd0iiMM-FeRMUj39eqyYTM1oSp4S-wsJ00QLXOCdwX552p2GoVUo2yhiBpWH2-TLic6jK3ZrKAj7LJVHb2Y8Iz4yIZAOWAJNMaPIH8mR5e8McqtKKq4e0gWiqqAGQSJzw3tzmRwz_7xTyzeCVXytg0hkcV3fyPbPZu5Qo1OHGvHE6nlmfqX6bCw1TK0FkZ6du7XWTQpQAp_WGg45WPD4062XiNnz59ly3zporREYse1TdvrZWAVoZh2HmcOO6E8ornTxA5Yi9En74rIyOcXASYPWlffHCm1Tz8Q9e1IjAAVqg2beZByc1J9cKHb3GBzo-GSsSoYqzYMI1ueyv8&c=V1m2Gw1L4m1vy_O6D65dnQc3_Ht1rTnRAkqluBaNCZSoasw5sT4fEw==&ch=l1LfJ7A4O5qqnVCSY-48e0nDdEo4uCygXo8J6aDWx9zg2Xjj4ZvMBQ==)

Friend, my heart sank when I heard the news. I just got word that the House Democrats' campaign arm saw record breaking fundraising AGAIN last month - _**$12,200,000+ raised**_ - just _barely_ outraising Republicans! Listen, Friend, if we continue on this path, Nancy Pelosi will capsize my campaign with her nearly unlimited funds and expand her House Majority! **Please, do not turn a blind eye.** My fight for common sense policies in Congress is dependent on YOUR support, especially in times like these. name: Kevin Hern
subject: FWD: Time to take back America
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
🕛 We want to wrap this up TONIGHT.
Peter, There is no better example of the catastrophe facing us in America than the Biden Border Crisis. And Joe Biden’s runaway left-wing tax-and-spend agenda – with a $6 TRILLION price tag – will impact every single American if we don’t stop him. I will continue doing my part and what you elected me to do – bring Oklahoma views and values to Washington, D.C. while standing strong for my convictions. I do need your help, though, to get our message out and ensure we’re doing all we can to save America. We're $2,200 short of our May End-of-Month goal, and it’s vital that we reach it. **[Please donate today to help put us over the top!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/5a5d6ec7009d4583c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** I know it’s a holiday weekend, so I appreciate you taking the time to interact with my team and I as well as [**chip in what you can**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/f285178ba59e0a87c3d6b838967d376c/34143). \- Kevin [**< < DONATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/8ab352f13de7654ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | |
---
From: Kevin Hern <info@hernforcongress.com>
Date: Friday, May 28, 2021 at 3:34 PM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: Time to take back America

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/94c8546c8ce9827bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Dear Peter,

Since Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi took over in Washington, things have gotten pretty bad.

Inflation is back because the Democrats passed a wasteful stimulus bill, and they still have billions in socialist legislation they’re attempting to pass.

I’ve been able to visit the border, and it’s in complete chaos. Yet Joe Biden and his administration are nowhere to be seen. Instead, they’re talking about $6 TRILLION spending sprees that will only burden the American people with more inflation and more debt.

Gas prices are up, tension in the Middle East is high, and the economy still hasn’t recovered from the COVID pandemic and shutdowns.

**I’ve been working to STOP the left’s extreme agenda at every turn. This month I released the only budget the House has seen in over 2 years. It’s conservative. It’s full of common sense. And it balances the budget in 5 years. **

Needless to say, I have an uphill climb to let it be heard. **[That’s why it’s critical that I have your support immediately](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/a7a6ff383a0d87a6c3d6b838967d376c/34143). **

We’re up against a tight timeline right now to meet our end-of-month fundraising goal for May. **[Will you please RUSH a donation of ANY amount to help us fight back against the leftist insanity in D.C.?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/a8eeaa52bdcb9e26c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
[**RUSH $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/58e4c2ccd0cf2cbac3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**RUSH $10 NOW >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/cd8f4be2e8e29cc4c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**RUSH $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/a766d90716357d02c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**RUSH $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/c0c484d312289c45c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**RUSH ANY AMOUNT NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d07d501434630e07/7b00e026f97c52c8c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
We need all donations to be received by MIDNIGHT on Monday for them to count towards our goal, so please don’t wait.

The future of our great country depends on every patriot standing up and fighting back!

Thanks for taking a stand,
Kevin Hern

subject: 2 minute update on America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blaine For Congress

I have a very important issue I would like to bring up with you because I know that you will understand what our country is going through right now.

clean_body: Michelle needs the help from every conservative to hit her mid-year fundraising goal. ** . == UPDATE SUPPORTERS NEEDED: 9 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM ON 05/31 Did you see Michelle's email from this morning? WE ARE NOW JUST 9 DONATIONS AWAY from reaching our goal and closing the books on a successful first half of the year. Michelle needs the help from every conservative to hit her mid-year fundraising goal. If she fails to reach this goal, a Republican House Majority is inserious jeopardy. Friend, there's no time to waste and we simply cannot allow the Democrats to outraise Michelle--if we fail, there will be no coming back from this. == If we don't win our race, we have no chance to take back the House next year, which means there will be nothing to stop Democrats from ramming through massive tax increases, radical socialist policies, and EVEN DEFUNDING OUR POLICE. Thank you, Team Steel Updates \--------Forward Message-------- From: Michelle Steel <info@michellesteelca.com> Subject: ⏳ We're approaching our deadline and I'm behind ⏳ Friend, I hate to ask this, but I need your help. Just got this message to show you
Friend --
I'll be really quick. I just got this message from our campaign finance team to reach out to you to ask for your help.
It looks like with just hours to go we are still short for our major end-of-month fundraising deadline in the must-win Texas Special Election Runoff.
[**That 's why I'm hoping you will chip in just $5 bucks before midnight tonight to help us get across the finish line? **](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MvyX39jzvFLPkDqz2D70GF-t37i65GKLIEwWR-yevBEtQApvJaWAKiajQaeuoB81mSZfdyxnlwrXt1ra4MHwvQbDQlZzm1F4EGfyyzSLhjN-VsYDTq3uXCTMONpeQIGV40xGS6AgJoigNjbqb6b32RaUW5qq9yaRGvz6w1EFh-ImbjQGVqOd6qYnlvwmictEqOtWfw7gJVCQHCD-V75i20a8AyQjhLSrA0gRfJDyNvMRAwGPN8ESXByv_poKsNsIrdW8q9hEoc_4Q_ccBGxBpj4UrUwje_zIhC5QdqAbJFwLISrQAh5mL7wNoyMli4NThn3i-si8M7M7MuWKmMnoYUHUGudOjZXhyqUAt969Ed9xzcMQnTJli29112oT48zHo63lkEXnfXnc2No8P1QQbDf9B8HgqFCMzLepFjBuvAkU4snuS--GQMBV79xj5LXR&c=Hny_07dTOCKkywAzAG-aOlay94Dg60goz1LuvRr6ySH_Dv1x3HSCAg==&ch=cEQcd1qvvf2Yy-msNDyBywf37A7OQVen40N5bh-GoXFm9iX7p3GyGQ==)
I don't ask for help like this unless it is extremely important. If we fall behind, there won't be time to catch up. [**Please consider making a contribution right now.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MvyX39jzvFLPkDqz2D70GF-t37i65GKLIEwWR-yevBEtQApvJaWAKiajQaeuoB81mSZfdyxnlwrXt1ra4MHwvQbDQlZzm1F4EGfyyzSLhjN-VsYDTq3uXCTMONpeQIGV40xGS6AgJoigNjbqb6b32RaUW5qq9yaRGvz6w1EFh-ImbjQGVqOd6qYnlvwmictEqOtWfw7gJVCQHCD-V75i20a8AyQjhLSrA0gRfJDyNvMRAwGPN8ESXByv_poKsNsIrdW8q9hEoc_4Q_ccBGxBpj4UrUwje_zIhC5QdqAbJFwLISrQAh5mL7wNoyMli4NThn3i-si8M7M7MuWKmMnoYUHUGudOjZXhyqUAt969Ed9xzcMQnTJli29112oT48zHo63lkEXnfXnc2No8P1QQbDf9B8HgqFCMzLepFjBuvAkU4snuS--GQMBV79xj5LXR&c=Hny_07dTOCKkywAzAG-aOlay94Dg60goz1LuvRr6ySH_Dv1x3HSCAg==&ch=cEQcd1qvvf2Yy-msNDyBywf37A7OQVen40N5bh-GoXFm9iX7p3GyGQ==)
Thanks for all you do. Let's win this thing.
-- Jake

name: Team Crist
subject: One month down
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor |
body:
Team,

It’s hard to believe, but we’ve already reached the end of the first month of our campaign!

Our team is building the momentum we need to beat Ron DeSantis, flip Florida blue, and get our state on the path to progress. All signs indicate that this election will be INCREDIBLY important to the future of our Democratic party.

"Florida may well be the single most important state for Democrats in the 2022 election." -- The Point with Chris Cillizza

Will you pitch in toward our end-of-month goal to help make sure Charlie has the resources to win?

>>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-mayeom?refcode=20210530_f_1_fl

To be honest, May was a bit of a whirlwind:

-- At the beginning of the month, Charlie officially announced that he is running for governor of Florida to defeat Ron DeSantis and build a Florida for all.

-- Since then, it’s become clear that Charlie is our best shot at making Ron DeSantis a one-term governor. Not only is he leading the polls for the Democratic primary, but folks are taking notice of the unique advantage Charlie brings to this race:

“Poll shows Charlie Crist with massive lead ...among Democratic voters” -- Florida Politics

"In the FL governor’s race, Charlie Crist could be as dangerous to Governor Ron DeSantis as Joe Biden was to Trump: a known quantity to most state voters, a decent man and moderate who’s hard to caricature as some proto-Marxist and someone who can de-Trumpify the state’s cruel image." -- Joy-Ann Reid

Chip in now to help Charlie win >>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-mayeom?refcode=20210530_f_1_fl

-- And, thanks to this incredible grassroots team, we’ve seen an outpouring of support from every corner of our state in just a few short weeks.

We’re one month down, but there are many more months to go. Can you chip in towards our end-of-month goal to help us prepare for the tough race ahead of us?

>>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-mayeom?refcode=20210530_f_1_fl

Thank you so much!

--Team Crist

DONATE >>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-mayeom?refcode=20210530_f_1_fl

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor |
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

I'd like to introduce you to my good friend and future Congresswoman, Ronda Kennedy. Ronda is a well known civil rights attorney who has spent her career taking on Democrat policies, like the lockdown on California churches and restrictions on gun sales, and her work has taken her all the way to the Supreme Court of the United States.
Clearly, Ronda knowns how to get things done. Now she needs your support to take that expertise to Congress where it really matters. That's one dollar for every Constitutional Amendment Ronda and I will be defending from the Socialist left.

Sincerely, Joe Collins Republican Navy Veteran running against Maxine Waters for CA 43 | | | Paid for by Joe Collins for Congress | 5777 CENTURY BLVD, STE 1110-143, Los Angeles, CA 90045 | | Sent by mailto:info@joecollinsforca43.com

| | You know what made me run for Senate, Peter? _**Because I want to serve Pennsylvanians as our Senator.**_ That's it. No dreams of the White House. Not the governor's appointee to fill a vacancy or some commission. Not ambassador to the UN or lead a trade delegation to the EU. And that's important, because Pennsylvanians deserve representation – full-time, focused, committed, representation in our government from someone trying to solve the current problems instead of trying to win the next election. [**If that sounds good to you, please chip in $3 right now to build our grassroots movement for leadership by the people, for the people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29994934/288149543/-34735242?refcode=2021-05-30-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=34804ee1-50c1-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDgwNGVlMS01MGMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnFaKtibXeoIJh0B0Cqto20K-ODpChogNaqOc48paHM=) Imagine a job interview, Peter: Manager: Can you tell me what you've learned in your current job? Applicant: Well, I spend most days at my desk applying for more prestigious jobs. Sometimes I take a week or so off to interview for other positions. In fact, they're paying me right now! Manager: Well, why do you want this job? Applicant: I don't, really; I just want to look experienced so I can apply for an even more prestigious job after two years. Speaking of which, can I take a paid vacation for my first two years? Stupid, right? That's the script my competitors are following. Half a dozen elected officials in this race – _people hired by Pennsylvanians to make our state better_ – have spent a massive amount of their time running for a different office. Ambition is one thing. Egomania and fraud are something else. **That's not right. Our representatives must serve the people who elected them. That's why we started this campaign, and it's what we're counting on to power us through the summer.[If you're with us, please contribute now and let's keep this movement going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29994935/288149544/-34735242?refcode=2021-05-30-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=34804ee1-50c1-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDgwNGVlMS01MGMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnFaKtibXeoIJh0B0Cqto20K-ODpChogNaqOc48paHM=)** clean_body: | | | You know what made me run for Senate, Peter? Because I want to serve Pennsylvanians as our Senator. That's it. No dreams of the White House. Not the governor's appointee to fill a vacancy or some commission. Not ambassador to the UN or lead a trade delegation to the EU. And that's important, because Pennsylvanians deserve representation – full-time, focused, committed, representation in our government from someone trying to solve the current problems instead of trying to win the next election. = Imagine a job interview, Peter: Manager: Can you tell me what you've learned in your current job? Applicant: Well, I spend most days at my desk applying for more prestigious jobs. Sometimes I take a week or so off to interview for other positions. In fact, they're paying me right now! Manager: Well, why do you want this job? Applicant: I don't, really; I just want to look experienced so I can apply for an even more prestigious job after two years. Speaking of which, can I take a paid vacation for my first two years? Stupid, right? That's the script my competitors are following. Half a dozen elected officials in this race – people hired by Pennsylvanians to make our state better – have spent a massive amount of their time running for a different office. Ambition is one thing. Egomania and fraud are something else. That's not right. Our representatives must serve the people who elected them. That's why we started this campaign, and it's what we're counting on to power us through the summer.= John Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA ---|--- | This email was sent by McGuiganForPA P.O. subject: yikes

body:
no room for error
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29997219/288154275/-2023814932?refcode=20210530_TM_5BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzgwNjUzNy01NmMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcQeflP53SwXD5S84w-m2XqhCEmB_38NVEi5oOIbY8g=)

| | Derek,

I just talked to our finance director, Ellie, about how our fundraising deadline finished out. And folks, all I can say is... yikes.

She let me know that we missed our goal by hundreds of donations. And I’m not going to lie -- for a second I was bummed. I thought our supporters got the seriousness of this moment.

But Derek, if you know me, you know that I’m an eternal optimist. When Ellie came up with the idea of setting a new donor goal before the end of May, I said “Game on!”

**[Derek, all eyes are on Virginia. Can you donate right now and help me send the message that we are FIRED UP to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29997220/288154276/-2023814932?refcode=20210530_TM_5BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzgwNjUzNy01NmMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcQeflP53SwXD5S84w-m2XqhCEmB_38NVEi5oOIbY8g=)**

**I’m going to level with you: we have no room for error here.** Glenn Youngkin is swimming in cash. He’s willing to spend $75 million of his own fortune to win this race -- that’s more than any candidate has ever spent in Virginia.

I’m ready to fight like hell to stop him from buying the Governor’s office, but I need a huge team of grassroots supporters behind me to do it.

**[Please -- can you chip in today and help us reach our goal of finding 2000 donations before the end of May?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29997221/288154277/-2023814932?refcode=20210530_TM_5BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzgwNjUzNy01NmMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcQeflP53SwXD5S84w-m2XqhCEmB_38NVEi5oOIbY8g=)**

We can do this, but only if we do it together.

\-- Terry | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29997222/288154278/-2023814932?refcode=20210530_TM_5BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzgwNjUzNy01NmMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcQeflP53SwXD5S84w-m2XqhCEmB_38NVEi5oOIbY8g=)

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: America Is Worthy of Our Love and Patriotism
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, ahead of Memorial Day, I talked about what motivated me to fight for our great country in the Navy SEALs. I also continued to call out President Biden and our military leadership for continuing to bring woke leftists politics into our military, and called out the left and the media for finally acknowledging the truth about the origins of COVID-19 in China.
Now, here's your brief.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
|
AMERICA IS WORTHY OF OUR LOVE AND PATRIOTISM
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X0GEuJOLOVh89WMU6ZHxFTAfZuhomZ2wgySvEvINIBpuPwvjQYbCDpPyF1tvotNBJzPcchMwnX5LPSjHC5vC3a0iA4EOMc7y7Ta5Vg4q4OgtPWdEmrNwx21837vInMPAN3bE8q-ohy5BBo7G2_v0Qb322SDn-BLuY8nsebIsr3kXCn2Pr6vH7WjKDB5IvPe1USTvINopopt2bKTCU4znVnbhPiJiP5BylSplFnbZiAK_PYB8lnBqju4L1QZdR5SWKO074Zap6aHTxL1rcbw5qaEjmSDlb7ivXWjv1ljLR5I=&c=6o_iHCKPPDOER4jkzJfkDudRgpNW8048XY6Edyw393FNi0z3S1espA==&ch=AUyw-mxLQU-RrxRq8xDpsXVQ5haVEkSZS_Xw7_daWr9w9PaRpYWUIg==)
---
|
[CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X0GEuJOLOVh89WMU6ZHxFTAfZuhomZ2wgySvEvINIBpuPwvjQYbCDpPyF1tvotNBJzPcchMwnX5LPSjHC5vC3a0iA4EOMc7y7Ta5Vg4q4OgtPWdEmrNwx21837vInMPAN3bE8q-ohy5BBo7G2_v0Qb322SDn-BLuY8nsebIsr3kXCn2Pr6vH7WjKDB5IvPe1USTvINopopt2bKTCU4znVnbhPiJiP5BylSplFnbZiAK_PYB8lnBqju4L1QZdR5SWKO074Zap6aHTxL1rcbw5qaEjmSDlb7ivXWjv1ljLR5I=&c=6o_iHCKPPDOER4jkzJfkDudRgpNW8048XY6Edyw393FNi0z3S1espA==&ch=AUyw-mxLQU-RrxRq8xDpsXVQ5haVEkSZS_Xw7_daWr9w9PaRpYWUIg==)
I knew from a very young age that I wanted to be a part of the world's most elite fighting force: the Navy SEALs.
People always ask why I chose the hardest, most grueling military training. And my answer to them is that I chose the SEALs BECAUSE it is the most grueling, because I would be asked to do the hardest things and be in the most extreme situations fighting for my country.
I knew what I was getting into when I joined the SEALs and I knew the risks. I accepted the risks because fighting to defend America is worth any risk. It's worth losing one eye and nearly losing sight in another.
And for those brave Americans who raise their hand and ask to go to war, America is worth dying for. That's who we are remembering this weekend - the brave men and women who paid the ultimate sacrifice to protect our freedom and way of life in the greatest country on earth.
Never Forget.
---
| | |
---
|
GET POLITICS OUT OF OUR MILITARY

We've seen institution after institution crippled by the woke agenda since President Biden took office. Now, the woke mob is going after our military. And to make matters worse, military leaders under President Biden are caving.
Since Biden took office: 1\. Critical Race Theory training - which President Trump banned - was reinstated.
2\. Biden's Defense Secretary called for taxpayer-funded gender reassignment surgery for soldiers.
3\. A Lieutenant Commander in Space Force was fired for warning about Marxism in our military.
4\. The U.S. Navy added highly partisan Marxist and "antiracist" literature to their reading program. I've had enough.
We should be preparing America's soldiers to fight and win battles - NOT become Social Justice Warriors. I hope the message to military leadership is clear: We aren't going to stand by as our military becomes another institution crippled by woke political correctness.
No more critical race theory, no more identity politics, no more political witch hunts.
[SIGN THE PETITION. TELL DEMOCRATS WE'RE NOT GOING TO LET THEIR WOKE AGENDA CRIPPLE OUR MILITARY.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X0GEuJOLOVh89WMU6ZHxFTAfZuhomZ2wgySvEvINIBpuPwvjQYbCDiHu5lTVBgsd7VcTfYkbnl6gorS9bYRJC77KB_N7iM-UJ1_jQDKuk2zer9ygrUFC91HevBIz_xetEmvrPduYP76Wwmu_66GlC6yZoWt6zJlnbbORXJn__kxndOIavFhHFXmOVJNYCiKUqI3Swuyf5TAxHMl9Q7rV-msPOu-fHghmeneRgrTqdXA=&c=6o_iHCKPPDOER4jkzJfkDudRgpNW8048XY6Edyw393FNi0z3S1espA==&ch=AUyw-mxLQU-RrxRq8xDpsXVQ5haVEkSZS_Xw7_daWr9w9PaRpYWUIg==)
---
| | |
---
|
EXPOSING THE TRUTH ABOUT COVID-19 ORIGINS
---

"Racist." "Xenophobic." "Conspiracy theorist."
That's what the left and their allies in the press called President Trump and Republicans who were calling for an investigation into the potential leak of COVID-19 from a lab in Wuhan, China.
Now all of those same critics have radically changed their tune.
Evidence emerged this week that strongly points the finger at the Chinese Communist Party and the lab in Wuhan, China where dangerous research was being conducted that may have caused this global pandemic.
I've been calling for investigations from the beginning, and the Energy and Commerce Committee - where I serve - is launching a full investigation into the origins of this pandemic. I've also introduced legislation that allows Americans to sue the Chinese government for their role in spreading this pandemic around the world. China even threatened me with sanctions for my statements, but I refused to stand down.
We need to get to the bottom of what really happened so it never happens again, and I'm not afraid to place the blame right on China's doorstep if necessary. But everyone from Fauci to Big Tech to the biased press needs to acknowledge their mistake in trying to discredit the commonsense lab-leak theory from the beginning.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, ahead of Memorial Day, I talked about what motivated me to fight for our great country in the Navy SEALs. I also continued to call out President Biden and our military leadership for continuing to bring woke leftists politics into our military, and called out the left and the media for finally acknowledging the truth about the origins of COVID-19 in China. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | AMERICA IS WORTHY OF OUR LOVE AND PATRIOTISM | == | == I knew from a very young age that I wanted to be a part of the world's most elite fighting force: the Navy SEALs. People always ask why I chose the hardest, most grueling military training. And my answer to them is that I chose the SEALs BECAUSE it is the most grueling, because I would be asked to do the hardest things and be in the most extreme situations fighting for my country. I knew what I was getting into when I joined the SEALs and I knew the risks. I accepted the risks because fighting to defend America is worth any risk. It's worth losing one eye and nearly losing sight in another. And for those brave Americans who raise their hand and ask to go to war, America is worth dying for. That's who we are remembering this weekend - the brave men and women who paid the ultimate sacrifice to protect our freedom and way of life in the greatest country on earth. Never Forget. | | | | GET POLITICS OUT OF OUR MILITARY We've seen institution after institution crippled by the woke agenda since President Biden took office. Now, the woke mob is going after our military. And to make matters worse, military leaders under President Biden are caving. Since Biden took office: 1\. Critical Race Theory training - which President Trump banned - was reinstated. 2\. Biden's Defense Secretary called for taxpayer-funded gender reassignment surgery for soldiers. 3\. A Lieutenant Commander in Space Force was fired for warning about Marxism in our military. 4\. The U.S. Navy added highly partisan Marxist and "antiracist" literature to their reading program. I've had enough. We should be preparing America's soldiers to fight and win battles - NOT become Social Justice Warriors. I hope the message to military leadership is clear: We aren't going to stand by as our military becomes another institution crippled by woke political correctness. No more critical race theory, no more identity politics, no more political witch hunts. == | | | | EXPOSING THE TRUTH ABOUT COVID-19 ORIGINS | == | == "Racist." "Xenophobic." "Conspiracy theorist." That's what the left and their allies in the press called President Trump and Republicans who were calling for an investigation into the potential leak of COVID-19 from a lab in Wuhan, China. Now all of those same critics have radically changed their tune. Evidence emerged this week that strongly points the finger at the Chinese Communist Party and the lab in Wuhan, China where dangerous research was being conducted that may have caused this global pandemic. I've been calling for investigations from the beginning, and the Energy and Commerce Committee - where I serve - is launching a full investigation into the origins of this pandemic. I've also introduced legislation that allows Americans to sue the Chinese government for their role in spreading this pandemic around the world. China even threatened me with sanctions for my statements, but I refused to stand down. We need to get to the bottom of what really happened so it never happens again, and I'm not afraid to place the blame right on China's doorstep if necessary. But everyone from Fauci to Big Tech to the biased press needs to acknowledge their mistake in trying to discredit the commonsense lab-leak theory from the beginning. | | | | == | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | == | == | == | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS KPRC: == WSJ: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

| Hello Peter,

I hope you are enjoying this holiday weekend. [_**I wanted to send a quick note to ask if you 'd consider contributing to my re-election campaign before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8TsNXA8QFAqtel4NHSUcO7eVfJBTbLb8NU4y3SsEbC0=/6b_kYPitNMe-_2eq-q0Z0qBbZ7iS7OmIglhNhHIzXrY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210530-1-EM&amount=25)

It is a great honor to work for the people of Virginia's Seventh District. However, there are national dark money groups who are doing everything they can to defeat me. They've already been running ads on televisions across our district!

We are working to raise the resources to defend my work and this seat. With your help, we will make sure everyone across our district knows how hard I am working for them, and how effective I am as a Member of Congress.

In honor of our nation's fallen service members, I will _not_ be following up tomorrow on our actual end-of-month deadline, so I humbly ask that you consider making a donation today.

_**First:**_ Susan already has **multiple Republican opponents** who are committed to flipping her seat. One of them is so wealthy she’s self-funding her campaign!

_**Next:**_ **GOP groups are already running ads in PA-07 attacking Susan.** We need the resources to correct the record.

_**Also:**_ We only have today and tomorrow left to meet our goal. And because tomorrow is a holiday, we won’t be emailing. So **we’re running out of time** if we want to meet this goal!

_**Finally:**_ If we want to keep the House, we cannot afford to lose PA-07. **To ensure that Kevin McCarthy does not become Speaker, we have to keep Susan in Congress.** And to achieve this, we have to meet every fundraising goal we set!

subject: a lot of ground to cover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:

Tomorrow night we'll close the books on a pretty important end-of-month fundraising deadline.
We set a goal of 3,000 donations before May ends to help us stay competitive in this race.
But right now, we're still 643 away from our goal. That's a lot of ground to cover by our deadline, so we're asking for your support.
**Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate**
**Fundraising deadline:** 5/31 at 11:59 PM
**Goal:** 3,000 grassroots donations _(643 short!)_
**[Friend, could you make a contribution and help us close this gap? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. **Take Our Country Back
**
Dear Friend,
I hate to bother you on a long weekend, but our end-of-month deadline is Monday night, and I need your help.

We are building our campaign fund to defeat the Democrats and take back the House in 2022, but we need to meet our fundraising goal for the month. **Will you help us?**
[**Donate Today**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8178d90f71474de7a2775a07406edcc3&_e=kuJddJC2gpvlZG4eHYnqn-ZIiQ3PTe2OCDFHyrQk-IOLt-0cD_1JqxsWWZn8zuQmPITsH3xoQMzMAKz_Ilo0Umqz1PD9Dqjq_DgvvN8NeKoEYMdSC71gSHddamaJooNV8Ua5hGj3T6ZiZFB7xLrnI0At5McQPa3PtTls15eEPnvO-9LcprE5GRTVo0B_T0fBCUkFXXhExXhUTBr_7iV_sL5rk7mQWYoH0yDF6Bdgrw0yHXbXEivr0TkM6BV5v7Dy9Z9M--7JRQGhtovTwRmH84y6PUXT7rFd_ZLdy3l2DTo%3D)
Everytime it seems like the Left can’t get more insane, they prove us wrong.

**→** House Democrats voted AGAINST sanctioning foreign supporters of the terrorist organization Hamas, which fired thousands of rockets at innocent civilians

**→** Joe Biden is pushing the anti-American critical race theory on our schools

**→** Crime is at an all-time high, and Democrats are STILL pushing to defund the police

These policies are so dangerous, they’re almost too crazy to be true. Except, it’s all true. All of it.

[It’s up to us conservatives to join together and make sure we defeat the liberals and take our country back](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8178d90f71474de7a2775a07406edcc3&_e=kuJddJC2gpvlZG4eHYnqn-ZIiQ3PTe2OCDFHyrQk-IOLt-0cD_1JqxsWWZn8zuQmPITsH3xoQMzMAKz_Ilo0UsbCSJtl7yJRDqXywxF5v4H7M7FkuYWKbZRQhJpMRrwYjSRZ3uInizYNLFE-9Yq2uAZi6ksnbo3xg006WMP8d5PbJIo3k8LYyUsKpp2y3tJXw5xhHrNRK34PZmoMrAhMgaTFg5rsju8TMhVeDRN8Xmh6ycZ5JJWQ5uli2JwFn81skDzikElNWrnKFQaujH7ctmeJ_l-ttEWpKdkRMaZQWHE%3D).

2022 may sound far away, but the Democrats are raising money from their Hollywood and Silicon Valley friends every day. We have to fight back or we will fall behind.

[Friend, can you be one of the first people to pitch in today and help us head into June with gusto?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8178d90f71474de7a2775a07406edcc3&_e=kuJddJC2gpvlZG4eHYnqn-ZIiQ3PTe2OCDFHyrQk-IOLt-0cD_1JqxsWWZn8zuQmPITsH3xoQMzMAKz_Ilo0Uqi8wfua7p8WpEXnvw89_EuNROPipYkWWtNEqLiuPHZwwYCYqKeH99EYm4nXTFqd5SHb2nMBC0PRzB3qpiieEXqVeufxYxNLgnQs5L5sVDBjXYDT-kQVTD1u_h1U-QrgoLp5DWCSL4nbFaYKBeq_3feOZ8UQ9blxTZ4-nk2TY2zQ5qW4_DnXIQHLX2Z25DsmGHrwKGS9dtChJXgbY-ncsTs%3D)

Whatever you give in the next 48 hours will go directly towards our fight to defeat Nancy Pelosi and take back the House of Representatives.

Everytime it seems like the Left can’t get more insane, they prove us wrong. → House Democrats voted AGAINST sanctioning foreign supporters of the terrorist organization Hamas, which fired thousands of rockets at innocent civilians → Joe Biden is pushing the anti-American critical race theory on our schools → Crime is at an all-time high, and Democrats are STILL pushing to defund the police These policies are so dangerous, they’re almost too crazy to be true. Except, it’s all true. All of it. . 2022 may sound far away, but the Democrats are raising money from their Hollywood and Silicon Valley friends every day. We have to fight back or we will fall behind. Whatever you give in the next 48 hours will go directly towards our fight to defeat Nancy Pelosi and take back the House of Representatives. So please give what you can today. Even if it’s just $10, $25, or $50, your investment in our conservative cause is critical. I love America, and I hate what the liberals are trying to do to this country. I will never stop fighting to protect our values and our way of life. Please do what you can to help me get the job done. Thank you for helping us keep up the fight, Tim Burchett | Thank you for supporting my work in Congress. Please consider a donation today so we can continue fighting for our values. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Hey there,

Can you donate to our end of month fundraising goal?

I just got a report from our team about where we stand on our goal. We still need to get about $1,482 in the next 48 hours.

I’m not going to lie, this is an ambitious goal. It’s one that we set based on where we stand, and where we need to be in order to win. If we can achieve this goal, we can show that our campaign has strong grassroots momentum.

If we all dig deep and chip in what we can, I know we’ll hit our goal.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: urgently --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I wish I didn’t have to email you on your holiday weekend, but I urgently need your help.

We are just 48 hours away from a high-priority election.

Republicans are working furiously to flip Deb Haaland’s seat in New Mexico.

It would mean so much to me to know you have my back:

STATUS:
[PENDING]

Suggested Support: $15 >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210530_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15

I’m counting on 9,051 Democrats before midnight to help beat back the Republican lies.

Can I count on your critical $15?

Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210530_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=5]

Chip in another amount now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210530_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=25]
Thank you, Nancy Pelosi
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. name: Wisconsin Data via Senate GOP
subject: Biden’s List of Lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Why is Biden addicted to this?
Friend,
Joe Biden cannot stop lying. Look at this:
1. Biden campaigned on no one would see a tax increase that is making under $400K? **This was a lie for political gain.**
2. Biden said he would not ban fracking.**This was a lie for political gain. **
3. Biden said President Roosevelt's proposal to pack the Supreme Court was a "bonehead idea." In April, he created a commission to look into packing the court. **This was a lie for political gain. **
4. Biden advertised his infrastructure bill as a targeted plan to help rebuild America, yet less than 6% of this proposal goes to roads and bridges. **This was a lie for political gain. **

body:
But we only have 48 hours to close the gap before the special election

Fellow Conservative, we're only 48 hours away from a crucial special election in New Mexico and _Democrats are getting nervous._

I have been pouring over the numbers and let me tell you, Fellow Conservative, this race is getting tighter and tighter. Republicans have a chance to flip this critical seat from **BLUE** to **RED** , _but only if we rush crucial reinforcements in these last two days. _

With only days until the election, Nancy Pelosi and her pack of wealthy liberal donors are flooding money into New Mexico because they know how devastating a loss this would be for Nancy's left-leaning majority in Congress.

She's got only a 5-seat majority in the House so losing this Democrat stronghold would be absolute EMBARRASSMENT to Pelosi.

If we rush resources to New Mexico, conservatives have a real chance to shock the media and Democratic power brokers and shrink Nancy Pelosi's grip on power in Washington. Republicans have a chance to flip this critical seat from BLUE to RED , but only if we rush crucial reinforcements in these last two days. == SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND STATUS: MISSING == == ****** With only days until the election, Nancy Pelosi and her pack of wealthy liberal donors are flooding money into New Mexico because they know how devastating a loss this would be for Nancy's left-leaning majority in Congress. She's got only a 5-seat majority in the House so losing this Democrat stronghold would be absolute EMBARRASSMENT to Pelosi. If we rush resources to New Mexico, conservatives have a real chance to shock the media and Democratic power brokers and shrink Nancy Pelosi's grip on power in Washington. == == SUPPORT THE GOP SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND == == == == == Fellow Conservative, any amount you can give, whether it's $5, $50, or $100, will go a long way in helping our mission to flip this seat and reclaim our conservative House majority! == Thank you, Karl Rove Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). clean_body: Will I see you there, Peter? | Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I’ve gotta tell you... I’m so excited for next week’s event with President Trump. It’s going to be amazing , and I’m hoping to see you there. President Trump has asked me to give one of his top supporters an exclusive opportunity to meet him in person at the event. Since you’ve been one of his top supporters since Day One, I thought of you immediately. | | If you think President Trump is amazing on TV or on Twitter, wait until you meet him in person. He’s exactly how you imagine him: full of energy and enthusiasm. He can’t wait to meet you, Peter. You don’t want to let this opportunity pass you by. Trust me. | | | | | (Hopefully) See you soon! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Team AOC
subject: Not just a number
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Your contribution isn’t just a name by a number in a database.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210530-2125-header&t=1&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)
We approach fundraising here at Team AOC a bit differently than most other campaigns. **To us, your contribution isn’t just a name by a number in a database.**
Your $3 contribution could help train another tutor as part of our Homework Helpers program.
It could help host a phone bank for volunteers to share important conversations with voters about policies like the Green New Deal.
It could ensure that our team has the resources to mobilize and provide support in response to a crisis or for other progressive candidates running for office.
And your $3 contribution definitely will help hit our end-of-month fundraising goal and ensure we can make long-term investments to keep AOC in office fighting for working families for years to come.
Tomorrow is officially our end-of-month deadline. So far, we've seen a tremendous outpouring of support, and we’re _so close_ to hitting our target — we’ll need a huge boost of support right now to hit our 15,000 contributions goal.
**[Before midnight tomorrow, can you please make one of the last few contributions we’re counting on to meet this crucial goal? We’ll put your contribution right to work building our movement for progressive legislation that puts working people first.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210530?refcode=em20210530-2125-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2125_2526796_hQb71v&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210530?refcode=em20210530-2125-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2125_2526796_hQb71v&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210530?refcode=em20210530-2125-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2125_2526796_hQb71v&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)**
We couldn’t thank you enough for being part of this movement. You’re the reason why our movement has grown to where it is today. Thank you. If you’re ready to make your first small-dollar contribution to our campaign today, it couldn’t come at a better time.
When thousands of grassroots supporters chip in, these $5, $15 or $50 donations added together make incredible things happen. They’ve resulted in over 1,500 tutoring sessions with students, thousands of phone calls and conversations about the Green New Deal, over $5 million raised for Texas relief, and 9,000 meals delivered to New Yorkers. We have plans to grow our movement even more, but we can’t do this work without you.
[If you’re able to pitch in today, your first donation of any amount will help our campaign stay on track for this month and reach our 15,000 contributions benchmark before midnight tomorrow. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210530?refcode=em20210530-2125-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2125_2526796_hQb71v&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)
Thank you for making all of this possible.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210530?refcode=em20210530-2125-P&t=24&refcode2=2125_2526796_hQb71v&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2125%2E2526796%2EhQb71v)

Friend,

clean_body: | Hi Peter — Veronica here! I know it’s Sunday, so I’ll keep this short and let you get back to your weekend. Election Day is quickly approaching. That means everything we do in these final days will have a significant impact on the outcome of the election — and yes, that includes hitting our fundraising target tomorrow night. The truth is, the money we raise from emails like this one goes directly toward keeping our ads running and reaching the undecided voters we need to win. In a race as close as this, every dollar makes a real difference. Peter, will you chip in toward our end-of-month deadline and help our team elect Hala our next Lt. Governor? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Okay, that’s all from me today. Enjoy the rest of your weekend! — Veronica Veronica Ingham Campaign Manager Hala for Virginia As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She’s running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. Will you pitch in to join our movement for a brighter future for all? | = | Paid for by Hala for Virginia Hala for Virginia P.O. Box 7434 Woodbridge, VA 22195 United States

subject: This May contribution goal could not come at a more important time
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends - We have some good news and some bad news.
**The bad news is** the NRA launched a campaign, spending millions of dollars to stop commonsense gun safety measures like universal background checks.
**The good news is** we’re only 1,197 donations away from hitting our May fundraising goal to help us pass universal background checks in the Senate.
Our May fundraising deadline ends tomorrow at midnight, and the vote on universal background checks could come up in the Senate any day now, so timing is critical. Which is why we have to ask:

name: Rebecca, me (2)
subject: Decided to close out early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca PAC
body:
Wouldn’t want to bother you tomorrow.
| Friend,
---
I decided to close the books on our May fundraising today instead of tomorrow.
---
Memorial Day is a time to honor America’s fallen heroes, and I am not sending any fundraising emails then.
---
That, of course, means that we’ll need to raise the remaining $6,221 by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT instead.
---
We based our budget off of Governor Evers’ fundraising numbers, which is why it’s so critical that we reach our goal.

clean_body: Wouldn’t want to bother you tomorrow. | Friend, I decided to close the books on our May fundraising today instead of tomorrow. Memorial Day is a time to honor America’s fallen heroes, and I am not sending any fundraising emails then. That, of course, means that we’ll need to raise the remaining $6,221 by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT instead. We based our budget off of Governor Evers’ fundraising numbers, which is why it’s so critical that we reach our goal. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Sent: Thur, May 27, 2021 Subject: RE: [Based on Evers’ reports] To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, My Finance Team and I looked over Tony Evers’ fundraising reports to set our monthly budgets. As it stands, we still need to raise another $12,460 to ensure we reach our goal and are able to compete with Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising. Now that the governor’s race has been rated a toss-up, beating Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising is our chance to take the upper hand in this election. That’s why I’ve authorized a MATCH for the next 30 minutes on all contributions. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Team Padilla
subject: $5 is all it takes to defend our Senate majority!
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21/?refcode=em210530-1-full&t=1001&refcode2=57_159979_HiRtnc&akid=57%2E159979%2EHiRtnc ]Friends — can you make a $5 donation today to support Alex
Padilla and defend our Senate majority?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?source=em210530-1-full&t=1002&refcode2=57_159979_HiRtnc&akid=57%2E159979%2EHiRtnc ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

Sorry to be so upfront, but we can’t waste any time. Our May fundraising
deadline is coming up tomorrow, and we still need more support to hit our
2,500 contribution goal.

Achieving this goal will help us build a strong team that will be
instrumental in defending this seat in 2022 and holding our Democratic
majority in the Senate.

And if we can do that, we can continue to focus our efforts on reforming
our immigration system, passing a Green New Deal and Medicare for All.

But as of this morning, we still have some work to do to hit our goal.
We’re confident that with your last-minute support, we can pick up the
pace and finish strong.

So before tomorrow, we have to ask.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21/?refcode=em210530-1-full&t=1003&refcode2=57_159979_HiRtnc&akid=57%2E159979%2EHiRtnc ]If you are able, will you make a $5 donation to help us hit our 2,500
contribution May fundraising goal? We’ve got so much work to do in the
coming months, and every donation sends a powerful message that we will
not back down without a fight.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210530-1-full&t=1016&refcode2=57_159979_HiRtnc&akid=57%2E159979%2EHiRtnc ]Donate $5 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210530-1-full&t=1017&refcode2=57_159979_HiRtnc&akid=57%2E159979%2EHiRtnc ]Donate $25

name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

[**Friends — we’re respectfully asking you to make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210530-1-15&t=1&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg)
Sorry to be so blunt, but our May fundraising deadline is on **Monday** at midnight and we need a last-minute push to hit our 50,000 contribution goal.
Hitting this goal is so important because One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking us . It’s the latest sign that National Republicans are willing to spend big money to try to win back this seat.
So in order to counter this avalanche of outside spending, we are going to fight back one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.
**So as McConnell’s super PAC and National Republicans swoop in to try and flip this seat, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 50,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210530-1-15&t=2&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210530-1-15&t=3&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210530-1-15&t=4&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210530-1-15&t=5&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210530-1-15&t=6&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210530-1-15&t=7&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210530-1-15&t=8&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg)
---|---
$5 at a time. That’s how we are going to overcome the massive amounts of outside spending that is already pouring into this race and hold this seat.
It’s not going to be easy, but if we work together and pitch in where we can, we know we will succeed.
Thank you for being a part of this team!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210530-1-15&t=9&refcode2=706_6688874_3igAgg&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=10&akid=706%2E6688874%2E3igAgg).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Sarah (Personal)
subject: I really need your help right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Dear Peter,

I didn't want to email you during tomorrow's holiday, so I asked my team to move our end-of-month fundraising deadline to tonight. But now, with only a few hours left we're still short of our $15,000 goal.

I really need your help right now. Everyone from _CNN_ to _Inside Elections_ is saying this race is winnable, but it's going to be difficult. Ron Johnson has the support of countless deep-pocketed friends -- including the full support of Donald Trump -- so we need to hit our grassroots fundraising goals each month to keep up.

Can I count on you to chip in $5 before midnight? Your support right now will help pay for gasoline, digital advertisements, campaign staff, and all our efforts to reach voters across Wisconsin.

Please use this personal link I've pulled for you to help us close our fundraising gap >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-may21-eom&refcode2=Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30012085/288213677/-49048448?gpsid=50_130_19140&refcode=em21_210530_EOM8_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210530_EOM8_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzVhNTEwNC04YWMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5PnKeS09KYxP1ofkZCcGEkSo8qbCHsSV1f8ePD9ZHQ=)

Sarah

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Following up about our May deadline -
| Peter,
---
As a Navy SEAL, Memorial Day will always be a special time of remembrance and reflection for me personally.
---
That’s why I’ve decided to close the books on our May fundraising ahead of the holiday...
---
_But that means we now only have until midnight tonight to meet our fundraising marks._
---
_With only a few hours remaining and $11,588 still to go, I’ve unlocked a 4X-MATCH for the next 30 minutes to ensure we CRUSH our goal._

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: FWD - 156 House Democrats agree on this. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I won’t stop fighting for a better healthcare system.
#
Hey Peter, I’m writing to you today with a short note for two reasons.
**First,** I wanted to make sure that you saw my email from Thursday about our fight to expand Medicare, improve its benefits, and lower prescription drug costs. I included that original message in this email, so please read on if you missed it.
**Second,** my team just let me know that we’re making progress on our $55,000 end-of-month goal, but that we’re still a bit short. We really need additional grassroots contributions from folks like you. **[Can you chip in $3 right now to help us expand Medicare and fuel my work for transformative change in this country?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2825?refcode=em20210530-335&t=1&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)**
Thank you for your support, and don’t forget to read on about our urgent fight for Medicare expansion if you didn’t catch my email from last week. _Here’s what The New York Times said about it:_
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2825?refcode=em20210530-335&t=2&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)
\- Pramila
\----Forwarded Message----
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: May 27, 2021
Subject: 156 House Democrats agree on this. Do you?
Peter,
I led more than 155 House Democrats today in calling on President Biden to expand Medicare as part of his next big piece of legislation. It’s not the first time I’ve emailed you about this — but since then, our movement has only gotten bigger.
Not only do we have 156 House Democrats (PLUS nearly 20 Senate Democrats) with us, but the coalition spans the ideological spectrum. We have progressives pushing for Medicare expansion, but we also have many of my more moderate colleagues on board. We even have 15 “frontliners” (Democrats in the toughest re-election races) signed on to this effort, because they know that expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug costs are hugely popular among voters from all political parties.
**[President Biden made campaign promises to expand Medicare and lower prescription drug costs, and now we’re working hard to ensure he follows through on those promises. Chip in $3 or more today and fuel our fight for real, transformative health care reform as we build towards Medicare for All.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2825?refcode=em20210530-335&t=21&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2825?refcode=em20210530-335&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)**
A full 70% of Democrats in the House, including folks in tough re-election fights, support expanding Medicare, improving benefits, and lowering prescription drug costs because it’s good policy — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them. Opening Medicare to millions of new folks gets people care who didn’t have it before, and lowering prescription costs can help people finally get the medicine they need to survive.
Again, here’s what we’re calling on President Biden to support in his next big bill:
* **Lowering the Medicare eligibility age:** This would immediately extend coverage to 23 million people, including many who lost insurance during the pandemic.

* **Improving Medicare benefits to finally cover dental, vision, and hearing care, and cap out-of-pocket costs:** This will give folks on Medicare much needed coverage to see the dentist, get hearing aids, and afford a new pair of glasses.

* **Empower Medicare to negotiate drug prices for everyone:** The U.S. spends far more than any other country on prescription drugs, despite Medicare Part D being the largest purchaser. We need the government to use its power to negotiate drug prices down for everyone.

These are widely popular measures and President Biden promised to deliver on them. Medicare for All is our end goal, and I’ll never stop leading the fight for it. But as we continue building our movement, we can pass this transformative Medicare expansion plan right away.
Fewer people will struggle without care, fewer people will struggle to get hearing aids and critical dental care, and fewer people will have to ration their insulin or go without the medicine they need.
**[That’s what we can deliver on with your help. Contribute what you can today as we make this historic push for expanding and improving Medicare. We need everyone doing their part to get this done.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2825?refcode=em20210530-335&t=23&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2825?refcode=em20210530-335&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)**
I will keep you updated on our push for expanding Medicare as our organizing continues.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210530-335-footer&t=25&refcode2=335_420207_wtmBlF&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=26&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=335%2E420207%2EwtmBlF)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Trump (for the 3rd time!) ✔️ Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) ✔️ Congressman Barry Moore (R-AL) ✔️ Conservative Talk Show Legend Mark Levin ✔️ Senate Conservatives Fund ✔️ National Association for Gun Rights ✔️ Americans for Legal Immigration PAC And a whole host of other patriots who are equally dedicated to the cause of Liberty! But you know what? We’ve still got a long road ahead of us to Election Day, and I need your help to keep our campaign moving and the wheels turning. We’ve got all the momentum in the world right now, but I’ve got to level with you, we’re coming up short on our May Fundraising Goal. "Click here to donate today!" "Click here to donate $25" "Click here to donate $45." "Click here to donate $85." "Click here to donate $125." "Click here to donate $250." "Click here to donate any amount." While our total amount raised is what helps us keep the lights on, it’s almost equally important that we’re able to muster support from as many conservatives as possible, so that we can show the Socialist Super PACs and D.C. Interest Groups that MAGA Nation runs deep. "Donate today!" I hope you’ll consider chipping in if you can. I’d surely appreciate it! For this generation and the next, Mo Brooks "Donate $20.22 for a victory in 2022!"

name: Erica Smith
subject: 1 in 100
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
It’s Sunday, and I wouldn’t email you if it weren’t important.
#
It’s Sunday, and I wouldn’t email you if it weren’t important. Our campaign is facing a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow. But before I ask you to [**make a contribution**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2055?refcode=em20210530-128&t=1&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd), I want to share why this race is so important to me.
I’m running for U.S. Senate because I know what it is to grow up poor. To grow up a Black woman in the South. And to participate in the generational fight for a place at the table.
**There are 100 U.S. Senators — there isn’t a single one like me. There isn’t one like US. But together, we can change that.**
[**_If you’re able, will you make a $5 contribution before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight? Every donation will help us unite a diverse, working-class coalition behind our platform for progress._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2055?refcode=em20210530-128&t=21&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2055?refcode=em20210530-128&t=22&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd)**
Rural families deserve a seat at the table. Black women deserve a seat at the table. Working families deserve a seat at the table — and those of us who have been left behind by the failed status quo that prioritizes profits over people deserve a seat at the table.
I may be 1 in 100, but I will carry the voices of millions of Americans whose experiences mirror mine.
**But first, we need to build an unstoppable movement to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue in 2022. That starts with ensuring we have the resources to build a campaign strong enough to stand up to the party establishment and special interests working against us.**
**[So, I’m humbly asking: If you’re able, will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline? Our campaign is 100% people-powered, so every donation is meaningful.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2055?refcode=em20210530-128&t=23&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd)**
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2055?refcode=em20210530-128&t=24&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd)**
For ALL of us,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210530-128-footer&t=25&refcode2=128_3698__x_2qd&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=128%2E3698%2E_x_2qd)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
