name: Charlie Crist
subject: What an exciting month it’s been!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
I'm so grateful for the outpouring of your support. Thank you!
|
---

| | Friend,

It's been such an exciting month since announcing my campaign for governor -- I'm so grateful for the outpouring of your support. _Thank you!_ Together, I know we can defeat Ron DeSantis and build a Florida for _all_ Floridians.

Over the past several weeks, I've been traveling the state, talking to Floridians and hearing so much about the difficulties families have been facing. The pandemic has been hard on everyone, but what's clear to me is that even outside of Covid-19, there's a lot going wrong here in Florida.

**I 'm going to need your help to win this race and get our beautiful state back on the right track. [If you're able, will you pitch in to my campaign today to help us reach our May end-of-month goal? We're counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us win.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7VUB0RSwdBOdjEOeX193FA==/T8ZBHnvixmSCcEjDzrS8-A==?refcode=20210531_f_1_fl)**

We'll start with the obvious: DeSantis' handling of this pandemic has been an abject failure. He failed to take adequate precautions in a timely manner, actively worked against state health officials, and apparently prioritized wealthy Republican-leaning neighborhoods where his donors live for early access to vaccines.

And now, DeSantis and his Republican allies in Tallahassee are more concerned with passing their pet voter suppression bill than they are with providing the relief Floridians need from the pandemic, making college and health care more affordable, or making our criminal justice system more fair for everyone.

When I served as governor, my first priority was always making sure that families in Florida could get ahead, not partisan politics. This time around will be no different -- but I'm counting on your help to win this race first. Ron DeSantis has _millions_ in special interest backing, and grassroots support will be critical to defeating him.

**There 's a long road ahead friend, but your support will make all the difference. Will you make a donation now to help us reach our end-of-month goal so we can defeat Ron DeSantis and finally build a Florida for _all_ Floridians?** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/7VUB0RSwdBOdjEOeX193FA==/T8ZBHnvixmSCcEjDzrS8-A==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210531_f_1_fl&amount=5)
[DONATE $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/7VUB0RSwdBOdjEOeX193FA==/T8ZBHnvixmSCcEjDzrS8-A==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210531_f_1_fl&amount=25)
[DONATE $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/7VUB0RSwdBOdjEOeX193FA==/T8ZBHnvixmSCcEjDzrS8-A==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210531_f_1_fl&amount=50)
[DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/7VUB0RSwdBOdjEOeX193FA==/T8ZBHnvixmSCcEjDzrS8-A==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210531_f_1_fl&amount=100)
[OTHER](https://act.myngp.com/el/7VUB0RSwdBOdjEOeX193FA==/T8ZBHnvixmSCcEjDzrS8-A==?refcode=20210531_f_1_fl)
Thank you,

Charlie Crist

We have a little over 24 hours left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, but right now we’re short of our goal. **[This team has never let us down before, so I know I can count on you -- will you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30015756/288225010/1118516000?refcode=RIS_20210530_e_f_us_na_na_5T&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjViZjIyNy05ZGMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGe2J9bDRdCMrrxAye-JLV-tIo2n9BycLZ3oMuckmMY=)**[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30015757/288225011/1118516000?refcode=RIS_20210530_e_f_us_na_na_5T&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjViZjIyNy05ZGMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGe2J9bDRdCMrrxAye-JLV-tIo2n9BycLZ3oMuckmMY=)

That’s why it’s so important to hit these early fundraising goals so we have the resources to compete.[Will you donate a few dollars before our deadline tomorrow night?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30015758/288225012/1118516000?refcode=RIS_20210530_e_f_us_na_na_5T&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjViZjIyNy05ZGMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGe2J9bDRdCMrrxAye-JLV-tIo2n9BycLZ3oMuckmMY=)**

name: Team Maggie
subject: This is a long -- but important -- email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
early fundraising is more valuable than late fundraising | | |
---
Hi there, Whether you’re spending the long weekend with friends and family or working, we know that your time is valuable. So to cut to the chase: Yes, this email is going to ask you to make a donation to Senator Maggie Hassan’s reelection campaign. **[If you’re ready to donate now, by all means please do!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30016449/288226674/1251890980?refcode=e20210531_lme&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjlkZDMwZS1hMWMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RTV2SVUre4FheetiaT1o47Fl8hFE4s9oEYAeap6DZlY=)** But we also wanted to give you an explanation as to why it’s so important: When Democrats won both Georgia runoffs in January, it created a 50/50 Senate. When there is a tie, Vice President Kamala Harris casts the deciding vote, giving Democrats a very narrow majority. Now, Maggie is up for reelection. She won her last race by a fraction of a percent, unseating a Republican. But that same election cycle, a Republican replaced Maggie (a Democrat) as Governor. So as you can see, New Hampshire is a VERY purple state, and everyone from Mitch McConnell to far-right outside groups see Maggie’s Senate seat as a top opportunity for Republicans to flip a seat and take back the Senate majority. Bad news, right? Usually, campaigns see the bulk of their fundraising in the days and weeks before the election, but that money isn’t as helpful as what is raised early. That’s because early fundraising lets campaigns like ours make plans for hiring staff, talking to voters, and creating and deploying ads. But that’s a LOT harder to do without money in the bank. We set fundraising goals each month to help us plan out our campaign strategy. Truthfully, this race is picking up steam faster than we anticipated and now we’re in a place where we need to fill a gap this month. It’s not dire but as we said, early fundraising is more valuable than late fundraising. **That’s why your donation today is so important.** **[Please: Our May deadline is TOMORROW AT MIDNIGHT and we could really use your help. Will you donate $5 or whatever you can to help Maggie win in New Hampshire and protect the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30016450/288226675/1251890980?refcode=e20210531_lme&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjlkZDMwZS1hMWMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RTV2SVUre4FheetiaT1o47Fl8hFE4s9oEYAeap6DZlY=)** Thank you so much,
Team Maggie | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30016451/288226676/-1667143680?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjlkZDMwZS1hMWMxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RTV2SVUre4FheetiaT1o47Fl8hFE4s9oEYAeap6DZlY=)
---

Mike broke down where Democrat and Republican leaders stand on all the top issues facing America today Peter, Did you see Mike’s message? _Mike broke down where Democrat and Republican leaders stand on the top issues facing America today –– and I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it!_ There’s a crisis of leadership in Washington with Democrats in charge and there’s one surefire way for conservatives like you and me to fight back, Peter: **Take back Congress in 2022.** Americans from coast to coast want common sense back in Congress and we only need to flip a handful of seats to make that happen. Peter,

I want to talk about the crisis of leadership we see unfolding in Washington.

The Democrat majority in charge of our government has made it clear that their agenda comes first –– and everything else comes second.

**_To put it bluntly, they’re advancing a reckless set of legislative priorities that put the future of our democracy, our alliances, and our institutions at stake._**

Here’s what I mean:

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Derek can't defend the House majority alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter, we wanted to make sure you got a chance to read Derek's note before our May end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight.

Derek is doing everything he can to ensure Democrats maintain control of the House next year. He's seen Republicans in Congress spread lies about the election and refuse to defend our democracy. He knows we cannot afford to hand them the House majority.

**[But Derek can't defend the Democratic House majority alone. Will you chip in $5 before the deadline to stand with him in this fight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/QYL_PwYFQe5QjXg9t-0PxYL0JkoFliqMc7n1iDYOxG0=/cqGyRFbGueXSl3ZdQCUBHozSU7gs1QbBREonked1spQ=?gpsid=50_115_19133&refcode=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Derek Kilmer
Date: Sat, May 29, 2021
Subject: I don't want to imagine what they'll do if they get control next year
Hello,

January 6th was a dark day for our democracy. Armed rioters stormed the Capitol building, wounded and killed several Capitol police officers, and tried to overthrow the results of a free and fair election.

We all saw these events play out on live television, so there shouldn't be any discrepancy about what happened. And there shouldn't be a single one of us who isn't committed to ensuring it _never_ happens again.

Yet 175 U.S. House Republicans -- including the House Minority Leader -- just voted against creating an independent commission to investigate the January 6th attack.

**We cannot risk handing the House majority over to folks who are unable to accept the truth and unwilling to defend our democracy.**

**[I'm doing everything I can to defend the House majority next year, but I need your help. Can I count on you to chip in $5 to ensure we have the resources we need to protect the Democratic House majority?](https://act.myngp.com/el/QYL_PwYFQe5QjXg9t-0PxYL0JkoFliqMc7n1iDYOxG0=/cqGyRFbGueXSl3ZdQCUBHozSU7gs1QbBREonked1spQ=?gpsid=50_115_19133&refcode=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Look, it's not just voting against the January 6th commission, friend. In recent weeks, they've ousted Liz Cheney for refusing to support The Big Lie, made outrageous claims about January 6th, spread conspiracy theories about the election and a global pandemic, and so much more. **I don 't even want to imagine what these folks would do if they regained control of the House of Representatives.**

**[Will you help me ensure Democrats maintain control of the House next year? Chip in $5 to ensure I have the resources I need to defend this seat -- and the Democratic House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QYL_PwYFQe5QjXg9t-0PxYL0JkoFliqMc7n1iDYOxG0=/cqGyRFbGueXSl3ZdQCUBHozSU7gs1QbBREonked1spQ=?gpsid=50_115_19133&refcode=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/QYL_PwYFQe5QjXg9t-0PxYL0JkoFliqMc7n1iDYOxG0=/cqGyRFbGueXSl3ZdQCUBHozSU7gs1QbBREonked1spQ=?gpsid=50_115_19133&refcode=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210530_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

Friend –
My name is Marco Lopez. I’m an immigrant running to flip Arizona's governorship for Democrats. And it’s true that if I got elected, I’d be the _only immigrant governor_ in the country. **[If you're ready to change the future of our state, please: Will you pitch in today to join our people-powered movement? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30018348/288248562/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk79-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjg2NGIzZS1hY2MxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_8pyq_gSbB6yoARnTcKxMbUX4jgtaKLfLn0PMXMj1k=)**

I’ve learned that we can’t sit back and let other people tell our story. So here’s mine:
I went from a small house in a border city to the Obama administration, working in Homeland Security – so no one needs to tell me what it takes to keep Arizona safe. I went from plumbing with my dad to creating thousands of jobs as a small business owner. So no one can tell me I don’t know the power of opportunity.
Our Democratic victories in 2020 have shown us that Arizona can lead the country in making big, inclusive change. But with extremist Republicans holding our state hostage – from attacks on voting rights that make it harder for people like me to vote, to trying to overturn President Biden’s victory – it’s clear we need new leadership if we want change that lasts.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says this race is a toss-up – which means Democrats can win – but Republicans are planning to spend MILLIONS to keep somebody like me, _como nosotros, _from becoming governor. But no one can tell me this team doesn't have what it takes to defeat GOP extremism and flip our state blue. That's why I'm writing to you today.

We set an ambitious $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, and I'm personally counting on this grassroots team to help us hit it so we have the resources we need to fight back against GOP megadonors and win this race. But with time running out, we're still falling short:**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, Giffords.org
subject: A personal ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi there,
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and I’m the new Senior Advisor at Giffords.
As a former congresswoman, I served as the Vice-Chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force and I worked tirelessly in the House to pass universal background checks in 2019. However, former Senate Majority Leader, Mitch McConnell left the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2019 untouched on his desk for almost two years.
I’ve dedicated my life to advocating for gun safety measures. And we have never been closer to passing universal background checks and saving lives. So before I go, I have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 donation May fundraising goal? body:
Wouldn’t want to bother you tomorrow.
| Friend,
---
I decided to close the books on our May fundraising today instead of tomorrow.
---
Memorial Day is a time to honor America’s fallen heroes, and I am not sending any fundraising emails then.
---
That, of course, means that we’ll need to raise the remaining $6,221 by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT instead.
---
We based our budget off of Governor Evers’ fundraising numbers, which is why it’s so critical that we reach our goal.

clean_body: Wouldn’t want to bother you tomorrow. | Friend, I decided to close the books on our May fundraising today instead of tomorrow. Memorial Day is a time to honor America’s fallen heroes, and I am not sending any fundraising emails then. That, of course, means that we’ll need to raise the remaining $6,221 by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT instead. We based our budget off of Governor Evers’ fundraising numbers, which is why it’s so critical that we reach our goal. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Sent: Thur, May 27, 2021 Subject: RE: [Based on Evers’ reports] To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, My Finance Team and I looked over Tony Evers’ fundraising reports to set our monthly budgets. As it stands, we still need to raise another $12,460 to ensure we reach our goal and are able to compete with Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising. Now that the governor’s race has been rated a toss-up, beating Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising is our chance to take the upper hand in this election. That’s why I’ve authorized a MATCH for the next 30 minutes on all contributions. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Time is running OUT

body:
#

**_May Fundraising Deadline_**
**Contribution Goal:** 50,000
**Deadline Day:** May 31st
**Suggested Donation:** $3
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210530-2-15&t=1&refcode2=711_6688874_fKc7lP&akid=711%2E6688874%2EfKc7lP)**
Friends —
**FIRST:** Mark reached out personally yesterday asking for your help to hit our May fundraising goal. He doesn’t reach out often so you know he really needs our help.
**THEN:** We told you, One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking our campaign.
**NOW:** We’re working around the clock to hit our 50,000 contribution goal by tomorrow at midnight. Time is running out, so we have to buckle down in these final hours.
If we can keep up the momentum and hit this goal, it’ll show our opponents that we’re serious about keeping Mark in the Senate and holding this seat. So here’s the part where we ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to defend Mark and hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210530-2-15&t=2&refcode2=711_6688874_fKc7lP&akid=711%2E6688874%2EfKc7lP)

---|---

---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210530-2-15&t=7&refcode2=711_6688874_fKc7lP&akid=711%2E6688874%2EfKc7lP) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210530-2-15&t=8&refcode2=711_6688874_fKc7lP&akid=711%2E6688874%2EfKc7lP)
---|---
We have a chance to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate for a full six-year term if lots and lots of people chip in what they can when they can.
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for having Mark’s back!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210530-2-15&t=9&refcode2=711_6688874_fKc7lP&akid=711%2E6688874%2EfKc7lP)**
